title: Talking about hobbies
subtitle: Say what you do for fun.
overview: Say what you do for fun.
Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: I go for walks after dinner.
What do you do for fun?
I read and go for walks.

items.en: I go for walks after dinner.
What do you do for fun?
I read and go for walks.
Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What do you do for fun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I read and go for walks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I read and go for walks.

items.en: I go for walks after dinner.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
